title: telis orthoceras
intro: Telis orthoceras, also known as orthoceras or fossil stone flower, is a plant-based fossilized material used in traditional medicine, primarily derived from ancient fossilized coral or sponge. The medicinal properties of telis orthoceras are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its mineral composition. It is said to provide health benefits such as reducing joint pain, improving skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of telis orthoceras include powder or tincture forms, often used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
